results.title: ‘Jana Nayagan’ frenzy reaches feverish pitch across Tamil Nadu
results.description: Frenzied fans and passionate TVK workers thronged cinemas on Thursday morning with excitement and watched the ‘first day first show’ of Chief Minister C Vijay Joseph starrer ‘Jana Nayagan,’ and celebrated the farewell movie in a variety of colourful ways. results.title: MedPlus puts ₹100 crore concierge healthcare project on hold after investor feedback
results.description: Gangadi Madhukar Reddy, MD & CEO, Medplus Health Services said the company had listened to shareholder concerns after the announcement triggered a sharp fall in its stock price.

results.title: Utho Cloud Announces 10,000 GPUs Expansion to Build India’s Sovereign AI Compute Backbone
results.description: Utho Cloud has announced its landmark commitment to deploy 10,000 GPUs in the next 7-8 quarters as part of its long-term vision to build India’s sovereign AI compute backbone. results.title: In 1997, Dharmendra Pradhan, then an ABVP leader, led a student protest against paper leak in Odisha
results.description: According to his old colleagues, in 1997, when Dharmendra Pradhan was the National Secretary of the Akhil Bharatiya Vidyarthi Parishad (ABVP), he led the protest against the Odisha government.
